self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Golden Majesty (R1): scoring hits on opponents increases ATK by 4% for 8s, max 5 stacks (retriggerable every 0.3s). While the wielder is protected by a shield, this ATK increase is doubled. Modeled at max stacks (unshielded +20%, shielded +40%); pick the state matching shield uptime. Shield Strength +20% is not modeled (non-combat).
